embedding_text:
问题：
什么是into？

详细上下文：
Vector databases store high-dimensional vectors. RAG pipelines parse documents, split text into chunks, generate QA records, and import embeddings into Chroma.

关键词：
into,Vector,databases,store,high-dimensional,vectors,RAG,pipelines,parse,documents,split,text

metadata.context: Vector databases store high-dimensional vectors. RAG pipelines parse documents, split text into chunks, generate QA records, and import embeddings into Chroma.
